tasks.title: Finalize Chief Guest for Kalahvengam
tasks.description: Contact potential chief guests for the inauguration ceremony and confirm their availability.

tasks.title: Submit Syllabus Coverage Report
tasks.description: Compile and submit the mid-semester syllabus coverage for all second-year courses.

tasks.title: Approve Budget for Sound System
tasks.description: Review the quotations submitted by the student committee for the Kalahvengam sound and lighting setup.

tasks.title: Audition Student Performances
tasks.description: Coordinate with the cultural committee to review and select dance and singing performances for the main event.

tasks.title: Prepare Department Timetable
tasks.description: Draft the academic timetable for the upcoming even semester and assign faculties to respective subjects.

tasks.title: Review Faculty Leave Applications
tasks.description: Process the pending leave applications of staff members for the current month.

tasks.title: Book College Auditorium
tasks.description: Secure the main college auditorium for the two days of the Kalahvengam festival.

tasks.title: Upload Internal Marks to Portal
tasks.description: Ensure all subject teachers have uploaded their assignment marks to the university portal.
